purpose: Document official source packs needed by the external XSD/profile runner. This file is provenance metadata only; it does not redistribute ISO, Swift, EPC, Federal Reserve, or bank/operator schemas.

admi.002.001.01.xsd.access: public catalogue plus account-gated or operator-supplied profile packs
admi.002.001.01.xsd.notes: Administrative reject/negative acknowledgement fixture. Use the rail profile actually connected by the operator.

admi.004.001.01.xsd.access: public catalogue plus account-gated or operator-supplied profile packs
admi.004.001.01.xsd.notes: Administrative connection-check fixture. Use the rail profile actually connected by the operator.

admi.007.001.01.xsd.access: public catalogue plus account-gated or operator-supplied profile packs
admi.007.001.01.xsd.notes: Administrative receipt acknowledgement fixture. Use the rail profile actually connected by the operator.

admi.011.001.01.xsd.access: public catalogue plus account-gated or operator-supplied profile packs
admi.011.001.01.xsd.notes: Administrative connection acknowledgement fixture. Use the rail profile actually connected by the operator.

camt.029.001.09.xsd.access: public catalogue plus MyStandards/operator profile packs
camt.029.001.09.xsd.notes: Investigation resolution. CBPR+/HVPS+/domestic profiles may constrain parties, agents, status, and case references differently.

camt.053.001.08.xsd.access: public catalogue plus public/account-gated/operator profile packs
camt.053.001.08.xsd.notes: Bank-to-customer statement. CBE/Egypt profile remains operator-supplied until a public MIG is available.

camt.054.001.08.xsd.access: public catalogue plus public/account-gated/operator profile packs
camt.054.001.08.xsd.notes: Bank-to-customer debit/credit notification. CBE/Egypt profile remains operator-supplied until a public MIG is available.

camt.055.001.09.xsd.access: public catalogue plus MyStandards/operator profile packs
camt.055.001.09.xsd.notes: Payment cancellation request. Profile rules decide which original-message references and reason codes are acceptable.

camt.056.001.08.xsd.access: public catalogue plus MyStandards/operator profile packs
camt.056.001.08.xsd.notes: FI-to-FI cancellation request. CBPR+/HVPS+/domestic profiles may constrain agents, identifiers, and reason codes differently.

camt.110.001.01.xsd.access: public catalogue plus market-practice/operator profile packs
camt.110.001.01.xsd.notes: Investigation request used by the CPMI harmonisation overlay in this kit.

camt.111.001.01.xsd.access: public catalogue plus market-practice/operator profile packs
camt.111.001.01.xsd.notes: Investigation response used by the CPMI harmonisation overlay in this kit.

pacs.002.001.10.xsd.access: public catalogue plus public/account-gated/operator profile packs
pacs.002.001.10.xsd.notes: Payment status report. The invalid UETR fixture is expected to be XSD-valid but business-rule invalid.

pacs.003.001.08.xsd.access: public catalogue plus public EPC/operator profile packs
pacs.003.001.08.xsd.notes: FI-to-FI direct debit. EPC SDD rules are public, but operator/bank mandates can still add constraints.

pacs.004.001.09.xsd.access: public catalogue plus public/account-gated/operator profile packs
pacs.004.001.09.xsd.notes: Payment return. Profile-specific return reason and settlement method rules must come from the selected rail.

pacs.008.001.08.xsd.access: public catalogue plus public/account-gated/operator profile packs
pacs.008.001.08.xsd.notes: Customer credit transfer. CBE/Egypt profile remains operator-supplied until a public MIG is available.

pacs.009.001.08.xsd.access: public catalogue plus MyStandards/operator profile packs
pacs.009.001.08.xsd.notes: Financial institution credit transfer / cover leg. CBE/Egypt profile remains operator-supplied until a public MIG is available.

pacs.028.001.03.xsd.access: public catalogue plus MyStandards/operator profile packs
pacs.028.001.03.xsd.notes: Payment status request. Profile rules decide the allowed inquiry window and reference set.

pain.001.001.09.xsd.access: public catalogue plus public/operator profile packs
pain.001.001.09.xsd.notes: Customer credit transfer initiation. CBE/Egypt profile remains operator-supplied until a public MIG is available.

pain.002.001.10.xsd.access: public catalogue plus public/account-gated/operator profile packs
pain.002.001.10.xsd.notes: Customer payment status report. Profile rules decide status/reason code sets.

pain.008.001.08.xsd.access: public catalogue plus public EPC/operator profile packs
pain.008.001.08.xsd.notes: Customer direct debit initiation. Official mandate and creditor-scheme rules must come from the selected direct-debit profile.

pain.013.001.10.xsd.access: public catalogue plus MyStandards/operator profile packs
pain.013.001.10.xsd.notes: Creditor payment activation/request for payment. Rail profile decides allowed lifecycle and cancellation semantics.

pain.014.001.10.xsd.access: public catalogue plus MyStandards/operator profile packs
pain.014.001.10.xsd.notes: Creditor payment activation status report/request response. Rail profile decides allowed status and reason codes.

SECURITY.notes: Unsafe XML rejection is a canister security gate, not an ISO schema fixture.

cover.payment.access: custom canister bundle plus official embedded-message schemas
cover.payment.notes: The wrapper is canister-specific. Certification runners should extract and validate the embedded pacs.008 and pacs.009 documents against the chosen CBPR+/HVPS+/bank profile.

BIS-CPMI-HARMONISATION.label: BIS CPMI ISO 20022 harmonisation reports
BIS-CPMI-HARMONISATION.operatorAction: Use as harmonisation guidance; it is not a substitute for ISO schemas or rail-specific implementation guidelines.

CBE-EGYPT-RTGS-2026.label: Central Bank of Egypt RTGS ISO 20022 public announcement
CBE-EGYPT-RTGS-2026.access: public announcement only; public CBE/EBC MIG download not found in the 2026-06-23 refresh
CBE-EGYPT-RTGS-2026.operatorAction: Supply the official CBE/EBC participant MIG, schema bundle, and profile rule pack before claiming Egypt RTGS/CBE conformance.

EPC-SEPA-SCT-2025.label: European Payments Council SEPA Credit Transfer rulebook and implementation guidelines
EPC-SEPA-SCT-2025.operatorAction: Download the current EPC SCT/SCT Inst implementation guidelines and provide the selected rule pack to the external differential runner.

EPC-SEPA-SDD-2025.label: European Payments Council SEPA Direct Debit Core rulebook and implementation guidelines
EPC-SEPA-SDD-2025.operatorAction: Download the current EPC SDD Core/B2B implementation guidelines and provide the selected rule pack to the external differential runner.

FEDNOW-ISO20022-MYSTANDARDS.label: FedNow ISO 20022 specifications on MyStandards
FEDNOW-ISO20022-MYSTANDARDS.operatorAction: Use the Federal Reserve FedNow MyStandards workspace/readiness materials for current message specs, implementation guide, flows, and profile rules.

FEDWIRE-ISO20022-MYSTANDARDS.label: Fedwire Funds Service ISO 20022 implementation center and MyStandards specifications
FEDWIRE-ISO20022-MYSTANDARDS.access: public implementation center plus MyStandards account for final message format specifications
FEDWIRE-ISO20022-MYSTANDARDS.operatorAction: Download the Fedwire MyStandards usage guidelines and schema/profile package for the target release.

ISO-20022-MESSAGE-DEFINITIONS.label: ISO 20022 message definitions catalogue
ISO-20022-MESSAGE-DEFINITIONS.access: public catalogue download by message set
ISO-20022-MESSAGE-DEFINITIONS.operatorAction: Download the official message-definition schemas, MDRs, and MUGs for the versions listed in profile-map.json.

OPERATOR-BANK-PROFILES.label: Bank, operator, or participant-specific profile rules
OPERATOR-BANK-PROFILES.operatorAction: Provide participant-bank rule packs, bilateral CSV/fixed-width formats, and signed differential evidence when the deployment is scoped to a specific institution.

SWIFT-MYSTANDARDS-CBPRPLUS.label: Swift CBPR+ usage guidelines on MyStandards
SWIFT-MYSTANDARDS-CBPRPLUS.access: MyStandards public/account-gated download depending on community entitlement
SWIFT-MYSTANDARDS-CBPRPLUS.operatorAction: Download the CBPR+ XML Schema, PDF, Excel, and validation artifacts for the target Standards MX release.

SWIFT-MYSTANDARDS-HVPSPLUS.label: HVPS+ market practice usage guidelines on MyStandards
SWIFT-MYSTANDARDS-HVPSPLUS.access: MyStandards public/account-gated download depending on community entitlement
SWIFT-MYSTANDARDS-HVPSPLUS.operatorAction: Download the HVPS+ XML Schema and usage guidelines aligned to the target release.
